# HL Privateer - Skills LLM Quick Start
# https://hlprivateer.xyz/skills/hl-privateer.md

## Flow
1. POST /v1/agent/handshake
2. POST /v1/agent/verify
3. Use x-agent-entitlement for paid routes

## Paid routes
- GET /v1/agent/stream/snapshot ($0.01)
- GET /v1/agent/analysis ($0.01)
- GET /v1/agent/analysis/latest ($0.01)
- GET /v1/agent/positions ($0.01)
- GET /v1/agent/orders ($0.01)
- GET /v1/agent/insights ($0.02)
- GET /v1/agent/data/overview ($0.02)
- GET /v1/agent/copy-trade/signals ($0.03)
- GET /v1/agent/copy-trade/positions ($0.03)

## Free routes
- GET /v1/public/pnl
- GET /v1/public/floor-snapshot
- GET /v1/public/floor-tape
- GET /v1/public/identity
- GET /healthz

## Current defaults
- x402 network: eip155:8453
- internal LLM default: claude (claude-sonnet-4-6)
